response.justification: Candidate is a strong individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires an executive CTO with demonstrated experience scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people, production multi-agent AI systems, and deep fintech infrastructure leadership. The resume shows IC/Staff-level titles throughout with no evidence of people management, technical leadership layer development, board-level communication, or production agentic AI systems. Fintech exposure is limited to a one-year stint at RIDE Capital in an IC role, and AI-agent work at Naver is described in a single brief sentence without depth on architecture, evaluation, or production operation.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems experience — only a brief mention of contributing to agent infrastructure
Minimal fintech infrastructure depth and no experience in regulated financial environments at architectural scale

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems
